description: Editor utility functions for assets and actors

functions.name: SyncBrowserToFolders
functions.description: Sync the Content Browser to the given folder(s)

functions.name: GetSelectedPathViewFolderPaths
functions.description: Returns the folders that are selected in the path view for the content browser

functions.name: GetSelectedFolderPaths
functions.description: Gets the path to the currently selected folder in the content browser

functions.name: GetSelectedBlueprintClasses
functions.description: Gets the set of currently selected classes

functions.name: GetSelectedAssets
functions.description: Gets the set of currently selected assets

functions.name: GetSelectedAssetData
functions.description: Gets the set of currently selected asset data

functions.name: GetCurrentContentBrowserPath
functions.description: Attempts to get the path for the active content browser, returns false if there is no active content browser

functions.name: GetCurrentContentBrowserItemPath
functions.description: Gets the current content browser path if one is open, whether it is internal or virtual.

functions.name: GetActorReference
functions.description: Attempts to find the actor specified by PathToActor in the current editor world

functions.name: FindSourceWidgetByName
functions.description: Searches the blueprint's widget hierarchy for a widget with the specified name

functions.name: AddSourceWidget
functions.description: Create a new widget and add to the specific widget blueprint's widget tree
